description: Financial results extraction — NVIDIA Q3 FY2024

input.text: NVIDIA reported record revenue of $18.1 billion for the third quarter of fiscal 2024, up 206% from the same period a year ago. Data Center revenue was $14.5 billion, up 279% year over year. Gaming revenue was $2.9 billion, up 81%. GAAP earnings per diluted share were $3.71. Net income totaled $9.2 billion.
